name: voltage
description: An open-source, FFmpeg-based video encoding API that supports multiple concurrent instances. Easily scale video processing with parallel encoding, efficient resource management, and flexible API endpoints for a reliable, production-ready solution.

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:runtime
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:runtime" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
